title: RADIUS - Source Toothbrush, Replacement-Head Technology and a Handle Made from Repurposed Materials, Colors May Vary (Super Soft, 1 Count)
description: Thanks to replacement-head technology and a handle made from repurposed materials, the Source™ reduces waste by 93%. When you’re done with one of its patented, gum-stimulating heads you simply swap it for another. And the luxurious cleaning continues.
features: EARTH-FRIENDLY and EASY TO HANDLE: Thanks to replacement-head technology and a handle made from repurposed materials, the Source reduces waste by 93%. When you’re done with one of its patented, gum-stimulating heads you simply swap it for another.

REPLACEABLE HEADS WITH PREMIUM BRISTLES: The Source cuts back on plastic usage while simultaneously boasting a unique curved bristle-bed, ensuring our sumptuously soft bristles clean and massage the gum rather than aggravating them.
LONGER NECK FOR A BETTER REACH: The Source has an unbreakable slim neck that’s longer than your average toothbrush to provide maximum reach in tight spaces.

UPCYCLED NATURAL-FEEL HANDLE: The elegant, one-of-a-kind handle is composed of repurposed and recycled materials — like wood, paper and even recycled dollar bills — for a beautiful, natural look and feel.
REVERSIBLE HANDLE DESIGN: As user-friendly for lefties as it is for right-handed brushers, the ergonomic design helps reduce pressure on teeth and gums for optimal oral health.

reviews.title: Very soft and gentle
reviews.text: Really like this soft, gentle toothbrush. The broad head reaches better and the softer bristles feel less damaging and irritating. Like that the heads are replaceable so there's not as much plastic waste.

reviews.title: Very soft and pleasant to use.
reviews.text: Soft on the gums and tongue!

reviews.title: A beautiful upgrade on traditional tooth brush.
reviews.text:
My son recommended this as an earth friendlier toothbrush. We love it. Design is attractive. Brush is well made and does a swell job brushing. Bought the replacement heads as well.
Elevating the mundane.

title: Pyhralke Schallcare Replacement Brush Heads Fit for Braun Oral b, Precision Heads Compatible with Oral-B Pro1000/9600/5000/3000/1500/Genius and Smart Electric Toothbrush(4pcs)
features: Compatible with Oral-B , Deep Sweep, SmartSeries, ProSeries, Triumph, Advance Power, ProfessionalCare, ProfessionalCare SmartSeries, Vitality Floss Action, Vitality Dual Clean, Vitality CrossAction, Vitality Precision Clean, Vitality Pro White, Vitality Sensitive, Vitality TriZone.(Attention: DO NOT compatible with oral b io)

Schallcare brush heads, the bristles with bacterial protective function, which can prevent bacterial growth on the brush. Also with strong cleaning function, which can removes up to 3x more plaque along the gum line than a traditional manual toothbrush.

Safe, healthy, and durable. Made with soft and flexible DuPont bristles and approved to meet official dental health and safety standards. At the same time, the production of brush heads uses a unique process technique, which greatly enhances the durability of the toothbrush head.

The slightly longer bristles at both ends are designed to easily clean the oral blind area--every side of the innermost teeth, also clean the gap of teeth, for comprehensive cleaning, fresh breath, prevention of tooth decay.

The soft to middle bristles protect teeth from harmful hard brushes and offer a more comfortable cleaning, better for your teeth and gum health. Side-to-side bristles sweep away plaque while the moving power tip penetrates hard to reach areas and fixed filaments help to whiten the enamel, reaching the most difficult areas.

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.

title: StarWin Portable UV Toothbrush Sanitizer Travel Case UV-C LED Sterilization and Rechargeable Sterilizer Box Cleaner Holder Fits Most Electric Toothbrush Heads and Manual Toothbrushes (1 Pack)
features: ✅Sterilization Effect 99.9%: Our UV toothbrush sanitizer uses UVC-LED to kill bacteria on your toothbrush to keep your toothbrush clean and maintain good oral health.

✅Built-in Rechargeable Battery: The toothbrush sterilizer case has a built-in rechargeable battery that does not require you to purchase additional batteries. Using the USB-C charging port, it can be fully charged in about 2 hours. A full charge lasts about 15 days.

✅Easy to Use: Put the toothbrush in the toothbrush sanitizer box and close the cover, press the switch to turn on the sterilization for 3 minutes, then the toothbrush cleaner will auto turn off when finished. When sterilization open the cover toothbrush sanitizer UV light auto stop working. Designed with ventilation and drainage port, avoid toothbrushes that become moldy and harbor bacteria in an airtight, humid environment(Shake off the excess water from the toothbrush before putting it in).
✅A Good Gift: The toothbrush sanitizer and holder is made of high-quality ABS material, elegant appearance, using gift box packaging, a good choice for you to give as a gift to relatives and friends.

✅Why StarWin: We sell a wide range of professional high-quality toothbrush sanitizers for home and travel use and offer 2 months free refund and 14 months free replacement, any issues just contact the seller and we will refund or exchange it within 12 hours for you.
✅Safety equipment certified by EPA agencies, EPA Establishment Number: 97846-CHN-1

title: Curaprox Soft Toothbrush CS 1560, 6 Pack, Colors May Vary
description: The CS 1560 Soft Toothbrush gently fights plaque and stains with the power of CUREN filaments. With densely packed and incredibly gentle bristles, the CS 1560 provides a deeper clean without damaging your gums. Tough on plaque and delicate on gums, the CS 1560 is designed for optimum oral health. The octagonal handle of the CS 1560 delivers precise manipulation to brush at every angle, with an angled brush head removes stubborn plaque and stains in hard-to-reach places. Enamel erosion and receding gum lines can be caused by vigorous scrubbing and hard brushes. To prevent this kind of damage, switch to a softer bristle like the CS 1560. CUREN bristles are gentler than typical nylon brushes for a healthier smile.
features: BRIGHTER SMILE: Transition to a softer brush and deeper clean with the CS 1560, equipped with 1,560 tightly packed 0.15 mm bristles to fight plaque and stay gentle on enamel and gums.
SOFT BRISTLES: By using CUREN filaments instead of nylon, Curaprox toothbrush bristles are incredibly fine and gentle to prevent enamel erosion.
GENTLE ON GUMS: Harsh brushing and stiff bristles can irritate your gum line. The CS 1560 cleans gently to promote gum and oral health.
ANGLED BRUSH: The angled head allows you to remove stubborn plaque and stains in hard to reach places.
STOCK UP: Available in a pack of 6 to stay stocked up year round for a healthier smile.

I would recommend to anyone buying this per as the advise of a dentist and also be aware that the touch and feeling is not similar to regular ones and may take a while to get used.
So far I love this toothbrush and will keep using it forever.

Experience the powerful cleaning of the foaming micro scrubbers while achieving maximum whitening results and stain removal simultaneously.

Advanced Teeth Whitening Formula - Our foaming toothpaste effectively cleans and break up plaque that accrues on teeth, especially after dark liquids like coffee, tea, or red wines. The bubbles penetrate those hard-to-reach places regular toothpaste can't get to.

A Powerful Toothpaste For Professional Results - Remove tough stains and prevent new stains from setting with our specially formula that penetrates teeth for deep whitening and not just surface stains.

Gentle Whitening - Our GO SMILE foaming toothpaste is safe to use on crowns, veneers, and other dental materials. Our toothpaste has been proven to whiten up to 10x better than the leading whitening toothpaste.

Created by a dentist, GO SMILE has been whitening smiles for nearly 20 years. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, we have revolutionized at-home and on-the-go teeth whitening products that are safe, effective and clinically proven to whiten with no sensitivity. Our products are known for their innovation, ease of use and award-winning results.

reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. I often use this brand and style it holds up very well, however I did not like the fact that they sent a guy a pink toothbrush.

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.

reviews.title: Nice quality and colors
reviews.text: Bought these to pack in hygiene kits for people in crisis, so they had to be individually wrapped to keep them hygienic and clean. They came in strips of 10 with perforations in between to separate each toothbrush. unfortunately, some of the seals between the toothbrushes split open when I cut them apart. I did not "tear" them apart, I very carefully cut them apart with long scissors, but the seal just wasn't good enough to hold. Maybe 4 out of 50 weren't usable because of this, which is unfortunate as we needed all 50. The price point was so reasonable, though, that this flaw could be forgiven.

reviews.title: Good water flosser
reviews.text:
I got this because my last water flosser has such a tiny water reservoir I don’t bother using it. I bought this one because of the larger water reservoir.

The first time I went to use it I was ready to give it 1 star. It was terrible. No water came out and my troubleshooting efforts left me nothing but frustrated. I tossed it back in the box to try again when I was less annoyed.

Then I tried again and love it. I don’t know what worked differently, but it’s worked well since the first time. Maybe it needed to get cursed at a few times to warm up. The flosser has different settings so you can pick what’s right for you. I liked the pulse setting because it seemed to leave me with less of that annoying water flosser spray that seems inevitable no matter how careful I am.

I didn’t love the toothbrush, and the water+toothbrush setting just seemed to be a mess with no actual flossing effect. I don’t intend to use this for brushing, but it will definitely replace my old water flosser.

reviews.title: A good deal having an electric toothbrush and flosser in one!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:5025a1cf3fd1dd9c157cb4eefde50d23]] If you can't have regular visits to the dentist, you may try this product! It is a toothbrush and flosser in one which is a good deal! It was messy on my first try as shown on the attached pic! I used the external water for the flosser and wasn't able to properly attached the flosser. I finally was able to  manage it on my subsequent attempts.  Although you can choose the different modes of output, the pressure of the water is a bit strong. I'm not sure if you can adjust the pressure. If you have sensitive gums or teeth, expect a little bleeding. Overall, this  is a great home product which I recommend!

reviews.title: WOW!
reviews.text: Nice combination. I've used the oral b, water pik and now this one. Its messy and the brush flosser isn't the hottest. By itself ok. If you disconnect the water line, plan on water everywhere. I prefer, the water pik and this brush. No fuss, no mess. Rechargeable is a plus. Looks to last a long time. Sonic vibrations are the bomb. Depending on your teeth, sonic is great. Not going back to oral b, sonic is much better. As a stand alone brush its great and worth the money for that alone.

reviews.title: Brush brush brush your teeth.
reviews.text: I've never owned a electric toothbrush so I wasn't sure what to expect. But after I received the unit I'm not sure how I survived without it. An electric toothbrush makes the tedious job of brushing your teeth a lot easier. The unit has numinous settings to (my favorite is pulse) allow you to select the best for your style of brushing. The head is relatively small so it can get all the way to your back teeth with ease. The real bonus is the water flosser feature. The first time tried it I ended up spraying the mirror and getting water everywhere since. Once i got the hang of it it felt good to use it in conjunction with he brush.  At first I couldn't figure out with the additional hose set was for. So I went back to the instructions and realized that it was for those times when I was out of my house so I could water floss.

reviews.title: Good combination but not executed well
reviews.text:
I have a sonic toothbrush that I love. I also have a water flosser that I love. I thought the idea of combining the two was genius. It made perfect sense to have a device that flushes out the spaces between your teeth while you brush. Unfortunately, while this model combines the two functions, it doesn't do either function as well as the individual devices do on their own. The vibrating toothbrush function is ok but not great. The water flosser doesn't feel like it has the same power or precision (even on the highest setting) as my stand alone water flosser. Also, the hose that connects the water flosser to the brush kinks very easily (especially if you use anything but warm water) so it's difficult to maneuver around your mouth without it stopping because the hose bent too much.
If I had never owned a vibrating toothbrush or a water flosser before I might think this was an awesome device but I was really hoping for more.

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

reviews.title: I really like this tooth brush
reviews.text:
I personally like a firm/hard bristled brush, but they don't seem to be available any longer. I ordered this "medium" 4-zone Colgate brush and found it to be very effective, and as close to firm as your going to get. Also, I really like the back of the brush, as it has an effective tongue cleaning pad that works well and feels great. I am now going to order some more of these while they're available.... I really like this tooth brush!
Note: This is a three pack, which is not in the bold description, but listed in the smaller font.
